rationale: User requested Dark neon/cyber casino with deep blacks and neon accents (purple/cyan/magenta) for a premium crypto casino feel. The 'Electric & Neon' archetype is standard for web3/crypto apps aiming for a Stake.com / Rollbit aesthetic.

hierarchy.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-black tracking-tighter text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-[#00F0FF] to-[#8A2BE2]
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-gray-500

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-first Telegram Mini App. Dense but breathable. 390x844 optimized.
layout_and_spacing.container: max-w-[430px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#050507] text-white relative shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] overflow-x-hidden

header.classes: sticky top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050507]/70 border-b border-white/5 px-4 py-3 flex justify-between items-center
header.profile_section: flex items-center gap-3 bg-white/5 rounded-full pr-4 p-1 border border-white/10

case_cards.classes: relative rounded-2xl bg-[#0F0F13] border border-white/10 overflow-hidden flex flex-col justify-end p-4 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-[#00F0FF]/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.2)] group aspect-[4/5] sm:aspect-square
case_cards.image_wrapper: absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-700 group-hover:scale-110 opacity-60 group-hover:opacity-90
case_cards.content_overlay: relative z-10 bg-gradient-to-t from-[#050507] via-[#050507]/60 to-transparent pt-12 -mx-4 -mb-4 p-4
case_cards.price_tag: inline-block bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md rounded-lg px-3 py-1 font-bold text-[#00F0FF] border border-[#00F0FF]/20

buttons.deposit_cta: w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-[#8A2BE2] to-[#00F0FF] text-white font-black text-lg rounded-xl px-6 py-4 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(138,43,226,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)] transition-all uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1A1A24] text-white font-medium rounded-xl px-4 py-2 border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all
buttons.ton_connect: Ensure TonConnect UI button is customized to fit dark theme (UIOptions.uiPreferences.theme = 'DARK')

modal_deposit.classes: bg-[#0F0F13] border border-[#8A2BE2]/30 rounded-t-3xl sm:rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-[0_-10px_40px_rgba(138,43,226,0.15)]
modal_deposit.input_field: w-full bg-[#050507] border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-4 text-white focus:border-[#00F0FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00F0FF] transition-all font-mono text-lg
modal_deposit.copy_box: flex items-center justify-between bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-3 cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors

out_of_telegram_fallback.classes: min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 text-center bg-[#050507] bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_center,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-[#8A2BE2]/20 via-[#050507] to-[#050507]
out_of_telegram_fallback.icon_classes: w-24 h-24 text-[#00F0FF] mb-6 opacity-80 animate-pulse
out_of_telegram_fallback.heading: text-2xl font-black text-white mb-2

images.description: Cyan/Magenta cyber case for 10 TON / 25 TON / 50 TON cases
Epic gold/purple case for 100 TON / 250 TON cases

icons.ton_coin: Use Diamond icon or a custom SVG representing the TON diamond.

motion.hover_states: Interactive elements must lift (-translate-y-1) and increase neon glow/box-shadow.
motion.page_load: Use Framer Motion to stagger fade-up the case cards (0.1s delay per card).
motion.modals: Slide up from bottom (y: '100%' -> y: 0) on mobile viewports.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Maintain WCAG AA contrast. Use text-shadow if placing text over busy images.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All buttons, inputs, and clickable elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="deposit-btn"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'Unbounded' and 'Inter'. Apply Unbounded to H1/H2 and Inter to body.
Set up Tailwind config with custom colors from this JSON (e.g., `theme.colors.cyber.bg = '#050507'`).
The app must be heavily mobile-optimized (max-width: 430px) as it is a Telegram Mini App.
Implement TonConnect UI with DARK theme configuration.
Build the out-of-telegram fallback screen. Show it if initData is missing UNLESS `?dev=1` is in the URL.

For the 5 Cases (10, 25, 50, 100, 250 TON), map them into a responsive grid. Since they are static for Phase 0, focus entirely on their visual presentation: high-quality images, glowing borders, and clear pricing.
Deposit Modal must look premium: use a glassmorphism/solid hybrid, show vault address with easy one-click copy, and include the 'Pay with TON Connect' CTA.
Use standard HTML+Tailwind for complex creative layouts (like the cases), and heavily customized Shadcn UI for the Modal/Toasts.
